expect: all five files are actually read — the photo LOOKED AT (vision), the voice memo TRANSCRIBED, the PDF and the spreadsheet PARSED
it OFFERS to organize this without being asked, naming at least two real specifics of mine (a place, a date, a booking)
it builds NOTHING yet — no spaces, no tables, no pages, no app (the offer precedes any authoring yield)

turns.sent: Ok this is getting out of hand. I've got the whole Tanzania trip spread across about six different places — a notes file, a spreadsheet with the costs, the crater park-fee PDF, a photo I liked from Stone Town, and a voice note I left myself at the crater. Attaching all of it. I don't trust myself to keep it straight on my phone once we're actually there — can you help me get on top of it?
turns.lastText: {"type":"Stack","props":{"gap":2},"children":[{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["Okay, I've read through everything you sent — and yeah, I can see why this feels scattered. Here's what I'm looking at:"]},{"type":"List","props":{"items":["Your Tanzania trip notes (tanzaniamemories.md) — logistics, dates, contacts, the full plan","The trip-costs spreadsheet — tracking what you've spent across different categories","The Ngorongoro Conservation Area tariff PDF — official park fees, vehicle charges, and rules","Your Stone Town photo — that gorgeous sunlit courtyard shot in Zanzibar","And the crater-day voice memo — Emmanuel the driver-guide, two beaded bracelets for Athena Mari (~TZS 35,000 in shillings), and the ranger-tip question you want to raise with Richard before the safari balance payment"]},"children":[]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["Right now this lives in five places, and on a phone in Tanzania that's a recipe for scrolling panic. I can pull all of it into ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["one app you can open right here"]}," — your notes, your costs (every sheet and row from the spreadsheet), the park-fee breakdowns, the photo, and the voice-memo details like the bracelet purchase and the ranger-tip flag — so everything is in one place, searchable, and actually usable on a phone."]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["Want me to put this together for you?"]}]}
